phase_name: pre-phase (project bootstrap complete; Phase 1 not yet planned)

completed_tasks.name: GSD settings configured via /gsd-config (adaptive profile, per-phase branching, intel+graphify on, code_review/ui_review/ctx-warnings off)
/gsd-ingest-docs new-mode bootstrap: classified + synthesized docs/direction-report-2026-06.md (DOC), zero conflicts
Roadmap generated: 6 phases, 24 requirements, Zellij-pivot milestone
Pivot widened: Plasma widget retired too; planning set amended consistently (CUT-01 reworded, DECK-03 added, PLUG-02 widened, UI hint moved P6→P5)

remaining_tasks.name: Plan Phase 1 (Running-State Seam) via /gsd-plan-phase 1 — branch gsd/phase-1-running-state-seam
Execute phases 1-6 per ROADMAP.md (state seam → Zellij plugin feasibility → core lifecycle → hold/resume → interaction layer → parity cutover)

decisions.decision: Replace kitty foundation with Zellij; rebuild SwitchTail as a WASM plugin (Rust/zellij-tile presumed, confirm in Phase 2 research)
decisions.rationale: Owner decision 2026-06-11; explicitly fires the direction report's 'mux migration is scheduled' trigger, superseding its defer verdict. Report's migration playbook (state seam first, four fused roles, ~28% paradigm rewrite) shaped the roadmap.

decisions.decision: Retire the Plasma 6 widget; the Zellij plugin contains the entire system surface
decisions.rationale: Owner decision 2026-06-11 (follow-up): Zellij plugin capability suffices for launcher/introspector. Widget stays installed through Phase 5 as a seam-verification probe; retired in Phase 6. --json contract downgraded from frozen GUI boundary to stable CLI/scripting/systemd contract.

decisions.decision: Ingest scope: direction report only; session handoff excluded as pattern false-positive; mode=new despite .planning/ existing (it held only config.json)
decisions.rationale: Handoffs are resume scratch, not planning docs; nothing existed to merge into.

decisions.decision: Success metric: functional parity with current kitty-based system on Zellij (suite green at >=147-assertion breadth)
decisions.rationale: Owner-supplied during ingest; parity redefined after widget retirement to mean in-plugin equivalents of widget functionality.

next_action: Run /gsd-plan-phase 1 (Running-State Seam). It will create branch gsd/phase-1-running-state-seam per config; merge phase branches back into versioning, not main.
context_notes: Session was pure planning bootstrap on branch versioning — no source code touched. Repo working tree clean at 175b0a0. The kitty-based v1 stays the daily driver until Phase 6 cutover; phases 1-5 are structurally constrained not to break it. Phase 2+ must research live Zellij plugin API docs (workflow.research is on) — nothing API-specific was frozen into the roadmap deliberately. Prior art to assess in Phase 2: zellij-attention, zellaude, zellij-sessionizer/zjsh/zsm/zellij-switch, zellij-pane-picker/room (user-supplied awesome-zellij list). gsd-tools warns about unknown config keys (tavily_search, ref_search, perplexity, jina) in .planning/config.json — harmless, ignored.
